---
title: "Global Artists"
runtime: shiny
output: 
  flexdashboard::flex_dashboard:
    theme: 
      version: 5
---


```{r, echo = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(tidyverse)
library(stringr)
library(rvest)
library(httr)
library(ggplot2)
library(readr)
library(plotly)
library(flexdashboard)
library(ggthemes)
library(shinyWidgets)
library(reshape2)
library(gt)




# Packages required for maps 
library(tidyverse)
library(mdsr)      # package associated with our MDSR book
library(poliscidata)
library(htmltools)
library(glue)
library(maps)
library(viridis)
library(statebins)
library(leaflet)
```


```{r, echo = FALSE}
artists <- read_csv("global_music.csv")
```


About
==========================

Column {data-width = 400}
-------------------------

#### Background Information


Our data was acquired though the [MusicBrainz API](https://musicbrainz.org/doc/MusicBrainz_API) and the files for this can be
found in our [GitHub](https://github.com/CelineeUWC/SDS_MP2).




Maps
==========================

Column {data-width = 400}
-------------------------

*Lets take a look at some maps*


```{r, echo = FALSE}

#here i got the average coordinate for each country 
country_coords <- map_data("world") |>
  
  group_by(region) |>
  
  summarize(
    Longitude = mean(long, na.rm = TRUE),
    Latitude = mean(lat, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

head(country_coords)


#here i cleaned the country names 

```

```{r}

artists <- artists |>
  mutate(
    Country = recode(
      Country,
      "united states" = "usa",
      "united kingdom" = "uk",
      "england" = "uk",
      "los angeles" = "usa",
      
    )
  )


```

```{r}
# more name cleaning 
artists$Country <- tolower(artists$Country)
country_coords$region <- tolower(country_coords$region)
```


```{r}

artists_map <- artists %>%
  
  left_join(
    country_coords,
    by = c("Country" = "region")
  )
```









Column
---------------------------------
currently my artits data does not have the longigute and latitude  i need to get it form some where else 



```{r}
ggplot(artists_map, aes(Longitude, Latitude))+
  geom_polygon(color = "white") +
  coord_fixed(1.3) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(na.value = "gray90") +
  labs(
    title = "Global Music Artists by Country",
    fill = "Artists"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```





Column
-------------------------

Here we will attempt to join map data with the global music artists data that 
we acquired through the MusicBrainz API database.


Artist Analysis
==========================




Collabs
==========================


Conclusion
==========================
